render.style_suffix: Simple flat 2D cartoon illustration, thick black outlines, flat solid color fills, no gradients, no shading, no depth of field, sharp flat background, simple rounded character shapes, minimal simple facial features, naive hand-drawn indie animation style, limited muted color palette

voice.name: Isabella
voice.note: Generated by the AGENT via the Higgsfield MCP (text2speech_v2 + elevenlabs). ~0.0146 cr/word. seed_audio takes archived in assets/seed_backup/.

segments.img_prompt: Extreme close up of a young Japanese geisha woman's face, stark white painted makeup, small red painted lips, black hair in an elaborate bun with a pink flower ornament, one single tear running down her white painted cheek, dark rainy night background with a soft glowing paper lantern.

animate.prompt: both eyes fully closed, symmetric closed eyes, thin curved closed eyelash lines, calm expression
paper lantern glowing noticeably brighter, warm intense flickering light

segments.vo: Every man in Kyoto wants to own her. Not one of them ever will.

segments.img_prompt: Interior of a warm lantern-lit Japanese teahouse room at night, a young geisha woman with stark white painted face makeup and small red lips and black hair in an elaborate bun with pink flower ornaments, wearing an ornate pink and red kimono, kneeling and pouring sake while three wealthy Japanese men in dark kimono sit laughing around a low table.

animate.prompt: round paper lantern glowing noticeably brighter, warm intense flickering light

segments.vo: She is a work of art that took twenty years and a small fortune to make. And tonight, behind a smile that could stop a war, she is quietly planning how to disappear.

segments.img_prompt: A young geisha woman with stark white painted face makeup and black hair in an elaborate bun with pink flower ornaments, wearing an ornate pink kimono, standing alone in a dark empty wooden corridor at night, looking back over her shoulder toward a closed paper sliding door, one paper lantern glowing, melancholy and quiet.

animate.prompt: both eyes fully closed at the same time, symmetric closed eyes, thin curved closed eyelash lines, calm expression
paper lantern glowing noticeably brighter, warm intense flickering light

segments.vo: To understand her, you have to become her. So we go back.

segments.img_prompt: A snowy poor Japanese village street at dusk in winter, simple wooden farmhouses, bare trees, soft falling snow, one small lantern glowing.
segments.vo: Back to the night your mother counts the rice in the cupboard, looks at you, and decides you are worth more sold.

segments.img_prompt: A small sad girl in a plain grey kimono standing in the snow, beside her a tall elegant woman in an ornate red flowered kimono handing coins to a poor peasant farmer. Quiet sorrowful mood, winter village at dusk.
segments.vo: You are seven years old. The woman in the beautiful kimono is not buying a daughter. She is buying an investment.

segments.img_prompt: A narrow old Kyoto street at night in the Gion district, traditional wooden machiya buildings with hanging red paper lanterns, wet cobblestones reflecting light, one small lone figure standing at a doorway, quiet and empty.
segments.vo: She is the okasan, the mother of an okiya, a geisha house in the Gion district. From tonight, you belong to her. Not to love. To debt.
segments.tts: She is the oh-kaa-san, the mother of an oh-kee-ya, a geisha house in the Ghee-on district. From tonight, you belong to her. Not to love. To debt.

segments.img_prompt: Close up overhead view of an open old Japanese account ledger book on a dark wooden table, handwritten vertical brush ink columns of numbers, a writing brush and black ink stone beside it, dim warm lamp light, shadowy.
segments.vo: Every kimono she puts on you, every lesson, every meal, written in a ledger with your name at the top.

segments.img_prompt: A small seven-year-old Japanese girl with a straight black bob haircut wearing a plain grey kimono, on her hands and knees scrubbing a long wooden floor corridor with a wet cloth and a wooden bucket beside her, cold early dawn light through paper screen walls, exhausted and small.

animate.prompt: both eyes fully closed at the same time as two simple curved lines side by side, calm expression

segments.vo: You will spend the next twenty years trying to pay off the price of your own life. At first, you are not a geisha at all. You are a shikomi. A servant.
segments.tts: You will spend the next twenty years trying to pay off the price of your own life. At first, you are not a geisha at all. You are a shee-koh-mee. A servant.

segments.img_prompt: A small seven-year-old Japanese girl with a straight black bob haircut wearing a plain grey kimono, peeking out from behind a wooden doorway at night, watching two elegant geisha women in bright ornate kimono with white painted faces walking gracefully past under glowing red paper lanterns, awe and longing.

animate.prompt: both eyes fully closed as two simple curved lines, calm expression

segments.vo: You watch the older women glide through the lantern light like they are made of something you are not.

segments.img_prompt: Close up of the face of a small seven-year-old Japanese girl with a straight black bob haircut, quiet determined expression, eyes reflecting warm glowing lantern light, dark night background.

animate.prompt: both eyes fully closed, symmetric closed eyes, gentle closed eyelids with eyelashes, calm expression

segments.vo: And a terrible, wonderful thought takes root. One day, that will be you.
